Item 1A. Risk Factors

Our business faces significant competition in all markets where we operate.

Macroeconomic conditions including inflation and interest rate changes may adversely affect consumer demand.

Our supply chain relies on third-party manufacturers located primarily in Asia.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Revenue increased 6% year-over-year to $89.5 billion for the quarter.

We expect continued growth in our Services segment going forward driven by strong subscriber momentum.

We anticipate headwinds from foreign exchange rates in the coming quarter.

Gross margin expanded to 46.2% reflecting favorable product mix and operational efficiency.

We project mid-single-digit growth in iPhone revenue for the next fiscal year.

Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data

See the consolidated financial statements included herein.
